name: neTV
longDescription:
neTV is a minimal, self-hosted web interface for IPTV streams. It plays content from your own Xtream Codes or M3U provider with a clean UI that works on desktop, tablet, mobile, and Chromecast.

Designed to do one thing well: play IPTV with a fast, keyboard-friendly interface. Features include a live EPG grid guide, movies and series with metadata, search across all content, favorites with drag-and-drop ordering, resume playback, and closed captions with style customization.

Transcoding is extensively optimized for low latency: smart passthrough remuxes h264+aac streams without re-encoding (zero CPU), with optional full GPU acceleration (NVENC/VAAPI/QSV) when a GPU is present.
description: A minimal, self-hosted web IPTV player with EPG guide, VOD, and efficient transcoding.
